message:
fix(observability): use try_with instead of with for thread-local access in ContextGuard drop

ContextGuard::drop used CONTEXT_STACK.with() which panics if the
thread-local is already destroyed (e.g., during thread shutdown when
destructors run in unpredictable order). Changed to try_with() which
returns Err instead of panicking, and the result is silently discarded
via let _ — the guard simply becomes a no-op if the thread-local is gone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
